name: Betaflight race rate guidance
note: Betaflight rate-calculator guide describes 550-650 deg/s as a common racing range.

name: Betaflight freestyle rate guidance
note: Betaflight rate-calculator guide describes 850-1200 deg/s as a common freestyle range.

name: Betaflight Actual Rates
note: Betaflight stores rate profile values in scaled integers; this row records the physical deg/s formula used for curve comparison.
formula: angleRate = rcCommand * centerSensitivity + max(0, maxRate-centerSensitivity) * expof

name: DronePhysics shapeRateInput
note: Current project formula preserves full-stick maxRate but changes center slope and mid-stick authority.
